mapper.select: select bno from member where id = #{id}
select count(*) from store where store_id = #{storeId}
select count(*) from store where store_code = #{storeCode}
mapper.insert: insert into store(store_id, store_code, store_name, store_address, store_phone, ceo_bno, created_at) values(#{store_id}, #{store_code}, #{store_name}, #{store_address}, #{store_phone}, #{ceo_bno}, now())
insert into store_member(store_id, member_bno, position, chk, employment, health, rate, color) values(#{store_id}, #{member_bno}, #{position}, #{chk}, #{employment}, #{health}, #{rate}, #{color})
mapper.select: select * from store where ceo_bno = #{ceoBno} order by created_at desc
select * from store where store_id = #{storeId} limit 1
select * from store where store_id = #{storeId} and ceo_bno = #{ceoBno} limit 1
select * from store where store_code = #{storeCode}
select * from store_member where store_id = #{storeId} and member_bno = #{memberBno} limit 1

select sm.store_member_id, sm.store_id, sm.member_bno, m.name, m.email, m.phone, sm.position, sm.chk, sm.created_at from store_member sm join member m on sm.member_bno = m.bno where sm.store_id = #{storeId} and sm.position = '직원' and sm.chk = 0 order by sm.store_member_id desc
select count(*) from store_member where store_id = #{storeId} and position = '직원' and chk = 0

select sm.store_member_id, sm.store_id, sm.member_bno, m.id as member_id, m.name, m.email, m.phone, sm.position, sm.chk, sm.employment, sm.health, sm.rate, sm.created_at from store_member sm join member m on sm.member_bno = m.bno where sm.store_id = #{storeId} and sm.position = '직원' and sm.chk = 1 order by sm.store_member_id desc
select count(*) from store_member where store_id = #{storeId} and position = '직원' and chk = 1

select sm.store_member_id, sm.store_id, sm.member_bno, m.id as member_id, m.name, m.email, m.phone, sm.position, sm.chk, sm.employment, sm.health, sm.rate, sm.created_at from store_member sm join member m on sm.member_bno = m.bno where sm.store_id = #{storeId} and sm.store_member_id = #{storeMemberId} and sm.position = '직원' and sm.chk = 1 limit 1

select sm.store_member_id, sm.store_id, sm.member_bno, m.id as member_id, m.name, m.email, m.phone, m.gender, m.bth, m.address, m.address_etc, sm.position, sm.chk, sm.employment, sm.health, sm.rate, sm.created_at, s.store_name, s.store_code from store_member sm join member m on sm.member_bno = m.bno join store s on sm.store_id = s.store_id where sm.store_id = #{storeId} and sm.member_bno = #{memberBno} and sm.position = '직원' limit 1

select sc.bno, sc.store_employee_bno, sc.work_date, sc.start_time, sc.end_time, sc.work_minutes, sc.status, sc.memo, sc.part_bno, sc.created_at, sc.updated_at, sm.member_bno, m.name as employee_name, m.id as employee_id, sp.part_name, sp.color_code, sp.sort_order from schedule sc join store_member sm on sm.store_member_id = sc.store_employee_bno join member m on m.bno = sm.member_bno left join schedule_part sp on sp.bno = sc.part_bno where sm.store_id = #{storeId} and sc.work_date between #{monthStart} and #{monthEnd} and sm.position = '직원' order by sc.work_date asc, case when sp.sort_order is null then 9999 else sp.sort_order end asc, sc.start_time asc, sc.bno asc

select sc.bno, sc.store_employee_bno, sc.work_date, sc.start_time, sc.end_time, sc.work_minutes, sc.status, sc.memo, sc.part_bno, sc.created_at, sc.updated_at, sm.member_bno, m.name as employee_name, m.id as employee_id, sp.part_name, sp.color_code, sp.sort_order from schedule sc join store_member sm on sm.store_member_id = sc.store_employee_bno join member m on m.bno = sm.member_bno left join schedule_part sp on sp.bno = sc.part_bno where sm.store_id = #{storeId} and sc.work_date = #{workDate} and sm.position = '직원' order by case when sp.sort_order is null then 9999 else sp.sort_order end asc, sc.start_time asc, sc.bno asc

select sc.bno, sc.store_employee_bno, sc.work_date, sc.start_time, sc.end_time, sc.work_minutes, sc.status, sc.memo, sc.part_bno, sc.created_at, sc.updated_at, sm.member_bno, m.name as employee_name, m.id as employee_id, sp.part_name, sp.color_code, sp.sort_order from schedule sc join store_member sm on sm.store_member_id = sc.store_employee_bno join member m on m.bno = sm.member_bno left join schedule_part sp on sp.bno = sc.part_bno where sm.store_id = #{storeId} and sc.bno = #{scheduleId} and sm.position = '직원' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into schedule ( store_employee_bno, work_date, start_time, end_time, work_minutes, status, memo, part_bno ) select sm.store_member_id, #{workDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{workMinutes}, #{status}, #{memo}, #{partBno} from store_member sm where sm.store_member_id = #{storeEmployeeBno} and sm.store_id = #{storeId} and sm.position = '직원' and sm.chk = 1
mapper.update: update schedule sc join store_member sm_target on sm_target.store_member_id = #{storeEmployeeBno} join store_member sm_owner on sm_owner.store_member_id = sc.store_employee_bno set sc.store_employee_bno = sm_target.store_member_id, sc.work_date = #{workDate}, sc.start_time = #{startTime}, sc.end_time = #{endTime}, sc.work_minutes = #{workMinutes}, sc.status = #{status}, sc.memo = #{memo}, sc.part_bno = #{partBno} where sc.bno = #{scheduleId} and sm_owner.store_id = #{storeId} and sm_owner.position = '직원' and sm_target.store_id = #{storeId} and sm_target.position = '직원' and sm_target.chk = 1
mapper.select: select sp.bno, sp.store_bno, sp.part_name, time_format(sp.start_time, '%H:%i') as start_time, time_format(sp.end_time, '%H:%i') as end_time, sp.color_code, sp.sort_order, sp.created_at, sp.updated_at from schedule_part sp join store_member owner on owner.store_member_id = sp.store_bno where owner.store_id = #{storeId} and owner.position = '사장' order by case when sp.sort_order is null then 9999 else sp.sort_order end asc, sp.start_time asc, sp.bno asc

select sp.bno, sp.store_bno, sp.part_name, time_format(sp.start_time, '%H:%i') as start_time, time_format(sp.end_time, '%H:%i') as end_time, sp.color_code, sp.sort_order, sp.created_at, sp.updated_at from schedule_part sp join store_member owner on owner.store_member_id = sp.store_bno where owner.store_id = #{storeId} and owner.position = '사장' and sp.bno = #{partBno} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into schedule_part ( store_bno, part_name, start_time, end_time, color_code, sort_order ) select owner.store_member_id, #{partName}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{colorCode}, #{sortOrder} from store_member owner where owner.store_id = #{storeId} and owner.position = '사장' order by owner.store_member_id asc limit 1
